name: temu-product-query
description: Query Temu products via EHunt filters. Triggers: Temu product search, Temu sourcing, bestsellers, semi-managed products, price/sales/rating filters. Use for product-level Temu discovery, not store rankings; use temu-store-query for sellers.
metadata_note: Generated for consistent local skill packaging. Claude Code routing is driven primarily by SKILL.md frontmatter and body.
